// reporters: Tier2ReporterDecl.java.txt#InternalLog.logInternal
package com.consumer.x;

// Case (iii): a bare same-package qualifier resolves to this file's own package
// (com.consumer.x), matching the declaration - a capture. A sibling method or a
// dropped error still swallows.
class Tier2SamePackage {
    void declaredIsCapture() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            InternalLog.logInternal("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void undeclaredMethodSwallows() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            InternalLog.other("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void argFlowStillRequired() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            InternalLog.logInternal("boom, error object dropped");
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
